name: curl
description: Transfer data from or to a server using URLs

name: -X
--request
options.description: Specify the HTTP method to use

name: -H
--header
options.description: Pass a custom header to the server

name: -d
--data
options.description: Send data in a POST request

options.name: --data-raw
options.description: Send data in a POST request without special interpretation of @ characters

options.name: --data-binary
options.description: Send binary data in a POST request

options.name: --data-urlencode
options.description: Send URL-encoded data in a POST request

name: -o
--output
options.description: Write output to a file instead of stdout

name: -O
--remote-name
options.description: Write output to a file named as the remote file

name: -s
--silent
options.description: Silent mode, do not show progress meter or error messages

name: -S
--show-error
options.description: When used with -s, show an error message if it fails

name: -v
--verbose
options.description: Make the operation more talkative

name: -L
--location
options.description: Follow redirects

name: -k
--insecure
options.description: Allow insecure server connections over TLS

name: -u
--user
options.description: Specify the user name and password for server authentication

name: -b
--cookie
options.description: Send cookies from string or file

name: -c
--cookie-jar
options.description: Write cookies to this file after operation

options.name: --compressed
options.description: Request compressed response and decompress automatically

name: -f
--fail
options.description: Fail silently on HTTP errors (no output)

name: -i
--include
options.description: Include HTTP response headers in the output

name: -I
--head
options.description: Fetch the headers only (HTTP HEAD request)

options.name: --connect-timeout
options.description: Maximum time in seconds for the connection to be established

name: -m
--max-time
options.description: Maximum time in seconds for the whole operation

options.name: --retry
options.description: Retry the request this number of times on transient errors

name: -A
--user-agent
options.description: Specify the User-Agent string to send

name: -e
--referer
options.description: Send the Referer header to the server

name: -x
--proxy
options.description: Use the specified proxy

options.name: -w
options.description: Display information after a completed transfer

name: -F
--form
options.description: Specify multipart form data

options.name: --cert
options.description: Use the specified client certificate file

options.name: --cacert
options.description: Use the specified CA certificate to verify the peer

options.name: --key
options.description: Private key file name
